### BLOCKERS

I am running as a sub-agent without write approval. Write operations (`edit_file`, `apply_patch`, `write_file`) require the parent session to be auto-approved or the user to approve each edit. I cannot proceed with these 4 files.

### SUMMARY

Read all four target files (mrna.py, atac.py, chip.py, degradome.py) in parallel. Each needs: (1) add `run_cmd` to the `prnaseqtools.functions` import line, (2) replace all `subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, check=True)` ‚Üí `run_cmd(cmd)`, removing trailing `2>&1`. The `rm -rf` calls (without `check=True`) need `run_cmd(..., check=False)`. Total ~60 edits across 4 files ‚Äî ready to execute once write approval is available.

---

### SUMMARY
Read all four target files (phasi.py, cips.py, clip.py, ts.py). Identified every `subprocess.run` call that must be replaced with `run_cmd`, plus the import additions needed. The changes are mechanical: add `run_cmd` to the `prnaseqtools.functions` import line, then replace each `subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, check=True)` with `run_cmd(cmd)`, stripping `2>&1` suffixes since `run_cmd` already merges stderr.

### EVIDENCE
- `prnaseqtools/modes/phasi.py`: imports `download_sra, unzip_file, _tee` from functions; 14 subprocess.run calls across lines ~87-183 and ~203-212
- `prnaseqtools/modes/cips.py`: imports `_tee` from functions; 2 subprocess.run calls (samtools faidx, Rscript)
- `prnaseqtools/modes/clip.py`: imports `download_sra, unzip_file, _tee` from functions; 16 subprocess.run calls (STAR, cutadapt, samtools, bamCoverage, clipper, bedtools, Rscript)
- `prnaseqtools/modes/ts.py`: imports `download_sra, unzip_file, rmvc, _tee` from functions; 16 subprocess.run calls (same pattern as clip.py plus ts_ana)

### CHANGES
None ‚Äî write tools blocked in this sub-agent. Detailed change list below for parent to apply.

### BLOCKERS
Write tools (`edit_file`, `exec_shell`) not available in this sub-agent. Parent must apply the following with auto-approval enabled.

---

## Required changes (apply in order)

### 1. phasi.py

**Import line (after download_sra, unzip_file, _tee):**
```
from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, _tee
‚Üí from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, _tee, run_cmd
```

**All subprocess.run ‚Üí run_cmd replacements (14 calls):**

| Line area | Command | Remove `2>&1`? |
|-----------|---------|----------------|
| `cutadapt ... 2>&1` | `run_cmd(f"cutadapt -j {thread} ...")` | yes |
| `bowtie ... 2>&1` | `run_cmd(f"bowtie -v 2 -a -p {thread} ...")` | yes |
| `awk ... > {tag}.nf` | `run_cmd(f"awk ...")` | no |
| `ShortStack ... 2>&1` | `run_cmd(f"ShortStack --outdir ...")` | yes |
| `samtools view -h ShortStack_{tag}/{tag}.bam > {tag}` | `run_cmd(f"samtools view -h ShortStack_{tag}/{tag}.bam > {tag}")` | no |
| `awk '...' {tag}` | `run_cmd(f"awk ...")` | no |
| `samtools view -Sb {tag}.unmapped.sam > {tag}.unmapped.bam` | `run_cmd(...)` | no |
| `samtools view -Sb {tag}.sam > {tag}.bam` | `run_cmd(...)` | no |
| `awk '...{n++}...' {tag}.sam >> {tag}.nf` | `run_cmd(...)` | no |
| `rm -rf ShortStack_{tag}` | `run_cmd(f"rm -rf ShortStack_{tag}")` | no |
| `samtools merge ...` (built command) | `run_cmd(command)` | no |
| `samtools view -h {sample}.bam > {sample}.sam` | `run_cmd(...)` | no |
| `samtools view -Sb {sample}.phasi.sam > {sample}.phasi.bam` | `run_cmd(...)` | no |

### 2. cips.py

**Import line:**
```
from prnaseqtools.functions import _tee
‚Üí from prnaseqtools.functions import _tee, run_cmd
```

**Replacements (2 calls):**
- `subprocess.run(f"samtools faidx {fasta_path}", shell=True, check=True)` ‚Üí `run_cmd(f"samtools faidx {fasta_path}")`
- `subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, check=True)` ‚Üí `run_cmd(cmd)` (Rscript command)

### 3. clip.py

**Import line:**
```
from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, _tee
‚Üí from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, _tee, run_cmd
```

**Replacements (16 calls), remove `2>&1` from all that have it:**
- `rm -rf Genome` (√ó2, one without check=True)
- `STAR ... genomeGenerate`
- `cutadapt ... 2>&1` (√ó3 variants for SE/PE/comma-split) ‚Üí strip `2>&1`
- `STAR ... 2>&1` (√ó3) ‚Üí strip `2>&1`
- `samtools index {tag}.bam`
- `bamCoverage ...`
- `clipper ... 2>&1` ‚Üí strip `2>&1`
- `cat ... | bedtools merge ...`
- `bedtools intersect ... | awk ...`
- `Rscript ... CLIP.R ...`

### 4. ts.py

**Import line:**
```
from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, rmvc, _tee
‚Üí from prnaseqtools.functions import download_sra, unzip_file, rmvc, _tee, run_cmd
```

**Replacements (16 calls) ‚Äî structurally identical to clip.py:**
Same categories as clip.py (STAR genomeGenerate, cutadapt√ó3, STAR√ó3, samtools index, bamCoverage, clipper, plus in `_ts_ana`: cat|bedtools merge, bedtools intersect|awk, Rscript). Also `rm -rf Genome` √ó2. Strip all `2>&1` suffixes.
